subject: A large minotaur warrior in heavy chained armor standing atop a rocky mountain ledge, holding a massive two-handed weapon with a curved blade — horned head visible, posture commanding and dominant
description: A mid-shot of a minotaur warrior — the bovine horns and broad head with animal features are clearly visible. The figure wears heavy, layered plate and chain armor in dark brown, bronze, and black tones, with chains and rings incorporated into the design. They hold a large two-handed weapon: a long shaft with a curved blade, held upright in a ready or triumphant posture. They stand on a rocky mountain ledge, with mountain peaks visible in the background under a pale sky. The armor design is gritty and functional, not ornate. The minotaur's posture is dominant and forward-facing.
foreground: Minotaur warrior in heavy chained armor, two-handed curved blade
background: Rocky mountain peaks, pale grey-blue sky
